untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'news event occurs' which is external event metadata not available in price/technical indicators. The 5-day confirmation period and fair-value gap estimation also require news-event anchoring and fundamental analysis inputs beyond technical indicators. Translated conservatively using post-event price underreaction proxies (low returns relative to volatility + subdued volume).
translation_notes: Unable to directly implement news event detection or fair-value gap calculation. Approximated underreaction as: (1) small absolute returns (< 1.5%) despite news, (2) volume ratio below threshold, (3) historical volatility below 3% threshold. Exit at 50% of gap estimated as 0.5% return threshold (half the underreaction threshold). 10-day MA used as available reversal proxy instead of undefined threshold.
